title: The Seraphim Hunt Everyone
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Shaka, Nami as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you doing this, S- snake?! on whose orders?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've been hearing explosions and screams!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure that the seraphim are on a rampage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Nami screams, there is someone who will show up to rescue her in a heartbeat

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Teams that are in a fight are stuck.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: While we are all busy fighting,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of it, there's one lab that was once used and is now sealed off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think anyone would have any use for that place though...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's check it out! Lead the way, Atlas!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm off to go look for vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you understand what 'the power of love' means?

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
